items.question_zh: 目标是否单一、清晰，并写成机器可验证的完成定义（DoD）？
items.question_en: Is the goal single, clear, and written as a machine-verifiable Definition of Done?

items.question_zh: 是否分离探索/规划与执行，避免解决错误的问题？
items.question_en: Is exploration/planning separated from execution to avoid solving the wrong problem?

items.question_zh: 是否有一个可运行、产出 pass/fail 的检查让循环自主闭合？
items.question_en: Is there a runnable pass/fail check that closes the loop autonomously?

items.question_zh: 反馈信号是否足够快、足够紧（优先最便宜能抓住该失败类的信号）？
items.question_en: Is the feedback signal fast and tight (cheapest signal that still catches the failure class)?

items.question_zh: checker 是否独立于 maker（全新上下文、只看 diff+标准）？
items.question_en: Is the checker independent of the maker (fresh context, diff+criteria only)?

items.question_zh: 是否有确定性停止闸门 + 最大轮数 + 升级触发？
items.question_en: Is there a deterministic stop gate + max-iterations + escalation triggers?

items.question_zh: 状态是否外置以在上下文重置后存活？
items.question_en: Is state externalized so it survives context resets?

items.question_zh: 自主度是否匹配爆炸半径 × 可逆性 × 反馈质量？
items.question_en: Is autonomy matched to blast radius × reversibility × feedback quality?
